response.step_by_step_log:
1.  Identified two distinct songs from the video, 'Cosmic Wonderful Tour!' and 'Twinkle 4 You', by observing the performance and on-screen text.
2.  Verified the songwriter as PandaBoY for both songs through search.
3.  Performed searches using the template: "[Song Title] PandaBoY Japanese and English lyrics".
4.  Extracted the Japanese lyrics and obtained English translations from the search results to populate the JSON.
5.  Noted a dialogue segment at the end of the video.
response.global_summary: A 3-part video featuring a 3D live concert performance by Hololive 5th Generation (NePoLaBo: Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy, and Shishiro Botan). The video includes two full songs, "Cosmic Wonderful Tour!" and "Twinkle 4 You," followed by a short dialogue interval.

scenes.description: NePoLaBo members performing 'Cosmic Wonderful Tour!' on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
So let's go! どこまでも踏み出そう
銀河のまんなか笑い合って Wonderful tour!
一歩目が既に異空間
キラリ 渦に巻き込まれた？
違うよ 出会いたくって
ホラみんなここにいる
夢のようで…だけどね
ファンタジーじゃない予感
流星群 負けないよ
光放って！
どんな憧れも飛び越えて
銀河のまんなか行進しよう
煌めきのシンフォニーさ
足跡だって星になる
1,2,3, Yeah!
奇跡散りばめ
1,2,3, Yeah!
何万光年を
1,2,3, Yeah!
眩しくてゆく季節が今
始まったんだよきっと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So let's go! Let's step out anywhere
Laughing together in the middle of the galaxy Wonderful tour!
The first step is already a strange space
Sparkling, did you get caught in the swirl?
No, I wanted to meet you
Look, everyone is here
It's like a dream... but you know
A premonition that it's not a fantasy
Meteor shower, I won't lose
Emit light!
Beyond any longing
Let's march in the middle of the galaxy
It's a symphony of sparkle
Even footsteps become stars
1,2,3, Yeah!
Sprinkled with miracles
1,2,3, Yeah!
Tens of thousands of light years
1,2,3, Yeah!
The season that is dazzling right now
Must have just started

scenes.description: NePoLaBo members performing 'Twinkle 4 You' on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君に届け 星のメロディー
想いをギュッとギュッと詰め込んで
君と奏でる このハーモニー
これからも ずっと続いてく
ねぇねぇ もっと近くにおいでよ
回り始めた世界で踊らない？終わらない
わくわく魔法かけたら
ドキドキはSyncしてほらParty Time 止まらない
Twinkle Twinkle Little Stars
願いを込めて
Twinkle Twinkle 夜空で歌いましょう
君に響け 星のメロディー
新しい星座を描いて
君と奏でる このハーモニー
これからも ずっと続いてく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Deliver to you, the melody of the stars
Stuffed tightly, tightly with our thoughts
This harmony played with you
It will continue forever
Hey, hey, come closer
Won't you dance in the world that has started to spin? It won't end
When you cast the excitement spell
The pounding hearts sync up, look, Party Time, it won't stop
Twinkle Twinkle Little Stars
With our wishes
Twinkle Twinkle, let's sing in the night sky
Resound to you, the melody of the stars
Drawing a new constellation
This harmony played with you
It will continue forever
